/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_skill.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_policy.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_importer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_verification.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_static_analysis.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_admission.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_reputation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_provenance.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_audit.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_executor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/euxis-bridge-cpp_tests.dir/tests/test_platform.cpp.o" -o euxis-bridge-cpp_tests  libeuxis-bridge-cpp.a /usr/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.17.0 ../euxis-crypto-cpp/libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a /usr/lib/libsodium.so /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libgtest.so.1.17.0
